# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| Latest  | ✅        |
| Older   | ❌        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Report them privately via [GitHub Private Security Disclosure](https://github.com/revoicechat/revoicechat/security/advisories/new)

Include as much detail as possible: description, steps to reproduce, potential impact, and any suggested fix.

## Response Time

- **Acknowledgement**: within 48 hours
- **Status update**: within 7 days
- **Patch & disclosure**: as soon as a fix is available

## Disclosure Policy

We follow coordinated disclosure. Please give us reasonable time to address the issue before making it public. We will credit you in the release notes unless you prefer to remain anonymous.
